title: Farming Meadow
description: A farming-focused modpack that expands Minecraft with new crops, biomes, animals, and tools, turning survival into a richer and more immersive agricultural adventure.
body:
Turn your Minecraft world into a living, breathing farming paradise! This modpack expands the farming experience with new biomes, crops, animals, and tools that make agriculture more fun, rewarding, and immersive.

Features include:

🌍 New biomes to explore and build your farms in

🌱 Dozens of new crops like tomatoes, corn, and many more

🧰 Tool Belt to store and quickly access your farming tools

🐄 Animal Feed Troughs to easily manage and feed your animals

🐎 Horse-drawn carts for transporting tools, hoes, and chests

🎨 Farmable dyes to grow your own colors

🐻 New animals including bears, elephants, and more

🔧 Improved hoe progression – better hoes now give higher crop yields, making tool upgrades meaningful

Perfect for players who love building farms, exploring nature, and creating a cozy survival world focused on agriculture.this is a farming modpack which adds:
